prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次44422名、2026年大幅扩招约31.5%的竞争缓解效应、物理类考生总数小幅增长约0.6%的竞争加剧 效应、以及计算机/电气等热门专业持续偏热可能吸引更多高分考生报考，扩招的缓解效应大于考生增长和热度带来的竞争加剧效应，预计位次较2025年有所后移（数字增大）；预测最低位次约52025名，区间51525–52525名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 41513 → 35593 → 50295 → 44422. In 2024, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements (physics-chemistry binding), there was a notable backward shift, but in 2025 it rebounded to 44422, with a fluctuation range of about 5800 positions in the last two years. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 101 in 2022 → 93 in 2023 → 102 in 2024 → 111 in 2025, showing a gradual annual increase. The 2026 plan is 146, a substantial expansion of about 31.5% compared to 2025, which is expected to alleviate competitive pressure, but the effect of expansion needs to be assessed in conjunction with the overall number of candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xinjiang University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it is approximately 131st, with recent rankings fluctuating between 127 and 136, indicating overall stability and placing it in the mid-to-lower tier of 211 universities. There are no notable public opinion incidents in the university's reputation files, and evaluations are stable. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 72nd, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 380,000, indicating low-to-medium short video exposure and no high-attention signals. Historical admission anomaly records also do not include this university, suggesting a stable psychological expectation among applicants. The fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include Xinjiang University, so information on its advantageous disciplines is missing.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Major categories such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation, which are the main enrollment majors in Physics Category, have consistently been in a 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' state in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, indicating high social attention that may attract more applicants. In 2026, the total number of Hubei Gaokao registrants is approximately 393,700, a slight increase from about 391,200 in 2025. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 63.8%, it is estimated that there will be about 251,200 Physics Category candidates in 2026, a small increase of about 0.6% from 249,800 in 2025, slightly expanding the competitive base. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 426 points, down from 437 points in 2024, indicating possible adjustments in exam difficulty. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, which is geographically distant from Hubei Province. Cross-province enrollment typically has lower regional preference, but as a 211 university, it still holds some appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 44422, the competitive relief effect of a substantial 31.5% expansion in 2026, the slight competitive intensification effect of a 0.6% increase in Physics Category candidates, and the sustained high popularity of majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering potentially attracting more high-scoring applicants, the relief effect of expansion outweighs the intensification effects from candidate growth and major popularity. Therefore, the ranking is expected to shift backward (numerical increase) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 52025, with a range of 51525–52525.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 51525–52525, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 popular majors as reach options (requiring rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information have seen consistently high popularity in recent years, and actual admission rankings may be much lower than the university's cutoff line, so applicants should assess based on their own rankings.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 6590 → 7438 → 6643 → 6142, fluctuating within the 6100–7500 range. After a notable decline in 2023, rankings have recovered over the past two years, reaching 6142 in 2025, the best in recent years. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category increased from 10 in 2022 to 12 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 14 in 2025, with a gradual annual increase. The 2026 plan is 17, an expansion of about 21.4% compared to 2025, a significant increase that is expected to ease competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 131st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, placing it in the mid-to-lower tier of 211 universities. Its reputation is stable, with no notable public opinion incidents. Douyin heat evaluation is 'average,' with no high-attention signals. No abnormal admission records have been observed for this university, indicating stable application expectations. The fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include Xinjiang University, so information on its advantageous disciplines is lacking.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Major History Category enrollment majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature have consistently been in a 'recommended' or 'slightly hot' state in recent popularity analyses, with high social attention. The total number of Hubei Gaokao examinees in 2026 is approximately 393,700. Based on the recent History Category proportion of about 36.2%, it is estimated that there will be about 142,500 History Category examinees in 2026, a slight increase of about 0.8% from 2025 (141,400), indicating a slight expansion of the competition base. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 442 points, up from 432 points in 2024, suggesting an increase in overall competition intensity. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Hubei Province, so cross-province study preferences are typically low, but as a 211 university, it still holds some appeal for History Category examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6142, the competition relief effect of an approximately 21.4% expansion in 2026, the slight competition intensification effect of a 0.8% increase in History Category examinees, and the potential attraction of more applicants due to the popularity of majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature, the relief effect of expansion roughly offsets the effects of examinee growth and popularity. However, the significant expansion still dominates, so the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward (numerical increase) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6832, with a range of 6332–7332.
